name: Tofu Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 3 large cloves garlic or 1/2 tsp garlic salt
1/2 lb lasagna noodles cooked according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a food processor or blender, puree the tofu, lemon juice, basil, honey, salt, and garlic (or garlic salt) into a fine ricotta-like texture.
Layer ingredients in a 9" x 13" baking dish: start with a thin layer of spaghetti sauce, followed by a layer of cooked noodles, then half of the tofu filling. Continue alternating layers of spaghetti sauce, noodles, and tofu filling until all ingredients are used, finishing with a final layer of spaghetti sauce on top.
Bake for about 30 minutes. Serves 8 to 10.
